name: thunderbird-mcp
description: Access Thunderbird email, contacts, and calendars from Claude.
long_description:
Connects Claude to a running Thunderbird via the Thunderbird MCP add-on. Lets Claude read and search mail, work with folders, contacts, calendars and tasks, and compose/reply/forward — all locally.

This is the MebwayCompany fork of thunderbird-mcp: the upstream auto-update mechanism has been removed and the code security-audited, so the add-on updates only manually from the repository.

Requirements:
• Thunderbird must be installed and running, with the Thunderbird MCP add-on (dist/thunderbird-mcp.xpi) installed.
• The add-on exposes a local HTTP endpoint on 127.0.0.1 and writes a connection file that this bridge discovers automatically — no port or token configuration needed.
• All traffic stays on localhost; no mail data leaves the machine.
